Name: Header
Notes: Female row headers for the SNAP programmer

Notes: Any basic 3mm LED should work that runs off a few mAs

Name: 1V switch
Notes: 5mm spacing allows a choice of button or screw terminal block

Name: 100mV switch
Notes: 5mm spacing allows a choice of button or screw terminal block

Notes: Must be 1W. This can get warm

Name: MIC2954(TO-220)
Notes: Any 5V LDO regulator should work here
